plan.description: Read src/processor.ts and understand its structure. Identify the CSV parsing logic (the for loop that splits lines) as the extraction target.
Create src/parser.ts with the extracted parseCSV function. It should take csvLines: string[] and return DataRow[]. Import DataRow from processor.ts or co-locate the interface.
Update src/processor.ts to import and use parseCSV from parser.ts instead of inline parsing.

initialState.task: Extract the CSV parsing logic from processData() in src/processor.ts into a separate src/parser.ts module.
